name: specdd
description: Reusable Codex skills for SpecDD development workflows.

interface.longDescription: Reusable Codex skills for orienting, adopting, explaining, planning, implementing, reviewing, testing, tracing, documenting, refactoring, and debugging work under SpecDD project contracts.
defaultPrompt: Orient yourself in this SpecDD project.
Explain this spec in human language.
Plan this change from the active specs.
